'''Lorindan''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] who worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] as a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] keeper. He was reputed to be a relative of the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]].<ref name="MTS" /> He also worked as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]], always looking for information to sell.<ref name="RKT" />

{{Char-stub}}
